Highest temperature in Taipei on March 13?
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Taipei Station in degrees Celsius on 13 Mar '25.
The resolution source for this market will be the Central Weather Administration station observations for Taipei station 466920, available from the official CODiS station observation pages.
This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.
The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 23°C).
Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered.
